content.situation: 旅客在酒店前台寄存行李后，想确认取件时是否需要提前通知或预约
content.speakerText: Your bags will be held here until you're ready to collect them.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的行李会在这里保管，直到您准备领取。
content.responseTemplate: Do I need to ___ before coming back?
content.hint: 询问是否需要提前告知工作人员你将前来取件
content.knowledgePoint: 确认取件流程中的必要步骤

content.situation: 旅客担心行李寄存时间过长，想确认是否可以延迟取件或延长寄存期限
content.speakerText: We keep luggage for up to seven days at no extra charge.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们免费为您保管行李最多七天。
content.responseTemplate: What if I can't pick them up within that time? Can I ___?
content.hint: 询问是否可以延长寄存时间
content.knowledgePoint: 询问服务的灵活性或延期选项

content.situation: 旅客准备取行李，但不确定是否需要携带所有寄存时提供的文件
content.speakerText: To collect your items, please bring the tag and a form of identification.
content.speakerTextCn: 领取行李时，请携带行李标签和身份证明。
content.responseTemplate: Is my ___ enough, or do I need the original receipt too?
content.hint: 确认身份证明文件是否足够，避免携带不必要的材料
content.knowledgePoint: 确认取件所需凭证的范围
